meanings.definition: move forward by leaps and bounds
examples: The horse bounded across the meadow
The child leapt across the puddle
Can you jump over the fence?

meanings.definition: form the boundary of; be contiguous to

examples: restrict the use of this parking lot
limit the time you can spend with your friends

meanings.definition: spring back; spring away from an impact
examples: These particles do not resile but they unite after they collide

meanings.definition: having the limits or boundaries established
examples: a delimited frontier through the disputed region
